item.title: Alchemy
item.description:
How does alchemy work:

You need to make sure you got these things :

1 : an empty bottle (at least for most potions)

2 : required reagents

3 : no less than 10 alchemy skill then listed here to try

4 : a mortar or heating stand (mortar for regular potions & heating stand for pagan potions)

To make a potion double-click the mortar/heating stand it will then give a cursor and you’ll be prompted to select a reagent to use select the right reagent and you’ll start making the potion !

item.title: Anatomy
item.description:
Using anatomy on a player or npc will determine their physical strength, agility and stamina.

If your anatomy skill is higher than 75 it will show the percentage of stamina the target has left with the message:

“This being is at xxx% of his max vigor.”

Anatomy will also increase your damage with melee weapons and the amount healed with bandages.

Strength

Strength Message
0-15 like they would have trouble lifting small objects.
16 - 30 Rather Feeble.
31 - 45 Somewhat weak.
46 - 60 To be of normal strength.
61 - 75 Somewhat strong.
76 - 90 Very strong.
91 - 105 Extremely strong.
106 - 120 Extraordinarily strong.
121 - 135 Strong as an ox.
136 - 150 One of the strongest people you have ever seen.
151 or higher Superhumanly strong.

Dexterity

Dexterity Message
0 - 15 like they barely manage to stay standing.
16 - 30 Very clumsy.
31 - 45 Somewhat uncoordinated.
46 - 60 Moderately dextrous.
61 - 75 Somewhat agile.
76 - 90 Very agile.
91 - 105 Extremely agile.
106 - 120 Extraordinarily agile.
121 - 135 Moves like quicksilver.
136 - 150 One of the fastest people you have ever seen.
151 or higher Superhumanly agile.

item.description:

1001 or higher Tremendously Strong

Hunger Level

Time until release Message
30 Minutes It looks very hungry!
60 Minutes It looks pretty hungry.
As long as you feed it, never It looks well fed.

item.title: Arms Lore
item.description:
Using arms lore on a weapon or armor piece will show you their damage, current hp, circle, chance of effect, poison level and armor rating.

When used on weapons with either a cast effect or poison level, one of the following messages will show:

  • The item has a chance of effect of (chance)%, effective at circle (circle).
  • The item has a permanent poison level of: X
  • The item has a temporary poison level of: X

Higher arms lore will also increase the quality when you craft an exceptional item.

item.title: Begging
item.description:
Using begging on a merchant npc will start the beg for gold action.

Higher begging and specialization in the bard class will increase the amount of gold gained.

You can only beg from the same npc every 60 seconds.

Possible begging messages:

  • Give me something please…
  • I need something to eat!
  • I’ve got four children, please help me!
  • Can you spare a dime?
  • Some thieves stole everything, I’m broke now…

Possible successful messages:

item.title: Camping
item.description:
To use camping you double-click kindlings either in your backpack or on the ground.

You can also gather kindlings by double-clicking a dagger and target a tree.

Using a bedroll next to a lit kindle will make your character logout after 30 seconds.

item.title: Carpentry
item.description:
To craft or repair something with carpentry you will need to use one of the carpentry tools: Saw, Dovetail saw, Draw knife, Froe, Inshave, Scorp, Jointing plane, Moulding plane, Smoothing plane or Hammer.

Using a carpentry tool on wood equipment near an anvil will try to repair it, higher carpentry and arms lore will increase your chance of repairing the item.

To craft items with multiple materials you will need to use your carpentry tool on the secondary material first and then the logs.

item.title: Cooking
item.description:
Cooking is used by double-clicking the ingredient to what you want to make near the correct type of fire.

The food value shows how much the food type will fill you up when eaten.

The cooking method determines wich fire type you will need.

Cooking Method

Method Fire type
0 None
1 Requires a fire
2 Requires an oven
3 Can be cooked in both oven and fires

item.title: Detecting Hidden
item.description:
Detecting hidden is used to detect traps or hidden players / npcs.

Being specialized thief classe and having higher detect hidden will increase your chances of finding hidden traps/players/npcs and increase the range of your skill.

item.title: Discordance
item.description:
To use discordance you will need to have an instrument in your backpack.

Discordance check both discordance skill and musicianship skill to see if you succeed.

If you manage to successfully discordance a npc it will turn of war mode and start to follow you.

Range and follow time will increase with skill and specialization in bard class.

item.title: Evaluating Intelligence
item.description:
Using evaluating intelligence on a player or npc will determine their intelligence, protections and current mana.

If your evaluating intelligence skill is higher than 90 it will show the percentage of mana the target has left with the message:

  • This being is at XXX% mental strength.
  • Evaluating intelligence can also show protections of npcs, this will require at least 135 for normal bosses and 150 for super bosses.
  • Evaluating intelligence will also increase your damage and duration of spells.
Intelligence Message
0-15 Slightly less intelligent than a rock.
16-30 Fairly Stupid.
31-45 Not the brightest.
46-60 About Average.
61-75 Moderately intelligent.
76-90 Very intelligent.
91-105 Extremely intelligent.
106-120 Extraordinarily intelligent.
121-135 Like a formidable intellect, well beyond even the extraordinary.
136-150 Like a definite genius.
Above 150 Superhumanly intelligent in a manner you cannot comprehend.

item.title: Fishing
item.description:
To fish you will need a fishing pole or special fishing net.

If you have a weapon equipped while fishing you will cut all normal fishes to raw fish steaks directly (magic fish won’t be cut).

Having a Fishing Rod of Sacrifice equipped will double the amount of fish caught.

item.title: Forensic Evaluation
item.description:
Forensic evaluation is used on corpses to find out the killer, looter, skinner and if skill is high enough even the time of death.

Forensic evaluation is a “free” skill for rangers and won’t count towards their spec or offspec skill count.

Tip: The best way to train your healing skill is by getting poisoned.

item.title: Hiding
item.description:
With this skill you can hide and make yourself invisible to other players and NPCs.

You will stay hidden until you move or use a skill or item.

You can’t hide while being too close to a hostile entity, the range from where you can hide from a hostile entity is decreased with skill and being a specialized thief class.

item.title: Inscription
item.description:
To scribe scrolls from books you will need to first target blank scrolls then the book you want to scribe from.

To scribe scrolls to books you will need to first target the scroll then the book you want to inscribe it to.

To copy a spellbook you need to target the book you want to copy first then an empty book.

To make a runebook you need to have all the ingredients in your backpack and target an unmarked rune.

item.title: Item Identification
item.description:
Using item identification on a magic item will reveal its properties.

The cooldown on item identification is decreased the higher skill you have and the higher specialized mage class you are.

item.title: Lockpicking
item.description:
Lockpicking is used by double-clicking lockpicks and selecting a locked container that you want to lockpick.

Some containers will have different lock difficulties depending how it faces, correct difficulties are showed ingame.

item.title: Lumberjacking
item.description:
You can use lumberjacking for either lumbering wood or to farm crops.

To lumber wood you need to double-click any type of axe then select a tree to lumber from.

Higher lumberjacking skill and specialized crafter class will generate more logs, lumberjacking with Xarafax’s axe will double the amount of logs you get.

Having atleast 90 lumberjacking and being specialized crafter class will make you handle the axe so good that it won’t break again.

Apocolypse Mortis De Fatum 120 WormsHeart DragonsBlood DaemonBone Brimstone Pumice VolcanicAsh BloodSpawn 20

item.title: Meditation
item.description:
This skill allows your character to meditate to regain lost mana.

You will regain mana quicker the higher skill and specialized mage class you are.

item.title: Mining
item.description:
You can use mining to either mine ore or to dig for sand.

To mine ore you need to double-click a pickaxe or shovel then select a cave floor to mine from.

To dig for sand you will need to use a shovel and target sand.

Higher mining skill and specialized crafter class will generate more ores, mining with Omero’s pickaxe will double the amount of ores you get.

Standing outside of guarded/safe zones will give you higher chance on getting zulu ores and gems aswell as generate more of all kind of ores/gems.

item.title: Musicianship
item.description:
When you double-click on a musical instrument, a music sample will play if you succeed and an ugly noise will occur if you fail.

When playing a musical instrument and standing still you will regain some of your stamina, the amount you regain will be higher the higher skill and specialized bard class you are.

This skill is also checked automatically each time you try to use one of the three specialized bard skills (discordance, peacemaking or provocation).

item.title: Parrying
item.description:
Parrying will increase the chance to block and damage blocked with shields.

Shield Armor rating Properties Blocks casting if equipped
Bronze Shield 16 * Yes
Buckler 2 * Yes
Kite Shield 16 * Yes
Heater Shield 16 * Yes
Metal Shield 16 * Yes
Shield of the Holy Element 40 Holy protection 50% No
Shield of Drakon 60 Poison protection lvl 3 No
Shield of Ryous 60 Earth protection 75% No
Shield of Darkness 60 Necro protection 75% No
Elven Shield 60 Healing increase lvl 3 No
Kite Shield 16 * Yes
Wooden Shield 16 * Yes

item.title: Peacemaking
item.description:
To use peacemaking you will need to have an instrument in your backpack.

Peacemaking checks both peacemaking skill and musicianship skill to see if you succeed.

If your target is a player it will check the players intelligence for difficulty up to a max of 150 difficulty.

If you manage to successfully peacemake a npc it will turn of war mode.

Range will increase with skill and specialization in bard class.

item.title: Poisoning
item.description:
You can use poisoning to poison either weapons, food or bandages.

Poisoning weapons will make it more difficult depending on the damage mod on the weapon.

Poisoned bandages can be used by specialized thiefs to heal.

Poisoned weapons made with the poisoning skill will only poison a target if the attacker is a specialized thief.

Poisoning Difficulties

Poison level Skill required
1 20
2 40
3 60
4 80
5 100
6 120

Extra Weapon Modifier Difficulties

Weapon mod Skill difficulty added
Ruin 5
Might 10
Force 15
Power 20
Vanquishing 25
Devastation 30
GM Weapon 35

item.title: Provocation
item.description:
To use provocation you will need to have an instrument in your backpack.

Provocation check both provocation skill and musicianship skill to see if you succeed.

Provocation is used to provoke one npc on to another npc/player, if successful the npc will start attacking the targeted npc/player

Success chance will increase with skill and specialization in bard class.

item.title: Remove Trap
item.description:
Using remove trap on a trapped container will try to remove the trap.

Remove trap doesn’t have any difficulty ranges.

item.title: Resisting Spells
item.description:
This skill is checked automatically each time you are attacked by magic.

If successful you take less damage from the spell.

You will gain higher resisting spells the higher circle the spell casted on you is, however you need to resist it to be able to gain.

Higher resisting spells and specialized mage class will make it easier to resist spells and lower the damage even more from spells.

item.title: Snooping
item.description:
To use snooping you need to double-click a pair of thief gloves then target a npc.

Snooping just allows you to see what a npc is carrying, stealing skill is required to actually steal something.

You can only snoop the same npc every 90 seconds.

item.title: Spirit Speak
item.description:
Spirit speak allows the user to speak with the dead.

Spirit speak has a cooldown of 120 seconds but changed to 0 by casting dispel on yourself.

item.title: Stealing
item.description:
To steal you will first need to snoop your target and then target the item you want to steal from the snooped container with your stealing ability.

item.title: Stealth
item.description:
The stealth skill allows you to move while being hidden.

To use stealth you will first need to be hidden and have at least 80 hiding.

If you run or use any skill/item while in stealth you will break it and reveal yourself.

The higher stealth skill and specialized thief class you are the longer you can move in stealth.

item.title: Tactics
item.description: Higher tactics will increase your chance to hit with melee weapons.

item.title: Tailoring
item.description:
Using a sewing kit on cloth/leather equipment near an anvil will try to repair it, higher tailoring and arms lore will increase your chance of repairing the item.

To make cloths you will need to use spool of threads near a loom and then cut the bolt of cloths you get with a scissor, if you then cut the cloths you will receive bandages.

Being higher specialized crafter classe and have higher tailoring will increase the crafted item quality and chance of being exceptional.

item.title: Taste Identification
item.description:
Using taste identification on a poisonous potion/food will try to determine the poison level on the item.

You can also directly try to drink/eat the poisonous item to try to determine it’s poison level.

Poison lvl Difficulty Message
1 15 a lesser poison.
2 30 a minor poison.
3 45 a regular poison.
4 60 a strong poison.
5 75 a greater poison.
6 90 a deadly poison.
“10” psn + suffix 150 an extremely deadly poison.
Suffix = [Level 1] +15 *
Suffix = [Level 2] +30 *
Suffix = [Level 3] +45 *
Suffix = [Level 4] +60 *
Suffix = [Level 5] +75 *
Suffix = [Level 6] +90 *

item.title: Tinkering
item.description:
To craft with tinkering double-click tinker tools then click on either ingots/logs/glass or clay.

Being a higher specialized crafter class and have higher tinkering skill will increase the crafted item’s quality and chance of being exceptional.

item.title: Tracking
item.description:
Tracking can be used to track either players or NPC’s.

Higher tracking and specialized ranger class will increase the range.

To track bosses you will need at least 135 and 150 for super bosses.

item.title: Veterinary
item.description:
To use veterinary you will need to double-click clean bandages and target an animal either alive or dead to try to heal/cure or resurrect it.

Animal Lore will increase the amount healed by veterinary.

You will need at least 100 animal lore to resurrect an animal.

Veterinary difficulties

Type Bandages needed Skill required
Normal heal 1 * Depends on missing health.
Cure level 1 poison 2 35
Cure level 2 poison 2 55
Cure level 3 poison 2 75
Cure level 4 poison 2 95
Cure level 5 poison 2 115
Cure level 6 poison 2 135
Resurrect 5 100 Animal lore * Veterinary depends on the taming difficulty.

Creatures with poison hit

Curing creatures is a good way to train Veterinary.

item.title: Wrestling
item.description: Wrestling will increase the damage and hit chance with your fists.

item.title: NPC & Boat Commands
item.description:
Merchants

Dragging a stable pet deed onto an animal trainer will give the pet back to you.

Command Information
Sell bag Will sell all the content of a targeted bag.
Sell all Will sell all the items on you that is of the same kind of the targeted item.
Sell Will bring up a sell gump that allows you to select what items you want to sell.
Buy Will bring up a buy menu that allows you to buy the selected items.
vendor train/merchant train Will bring up a skill training gump that allows you to train the selected skills to 33.3. Different vendors can train different skills.
identify This command only works on mages or scribes and allows you to identify items or full bags with items.
stable This command only works on animal trainers and will stable the selected pet.

Bankers

First time opening your bank for that character? Close the bank box and open it again to make sure your items won’t bug away, no items can be replaced by staff if this happens.
Command Information
bank Will open your bank box.
balance Shows the amount of gold you have in your bank.

High Priests

If you hand over less gold then asked for you will make the priest upset at you and you will have to donate gold to him before you can use his services again.

item.title: Commands
item.description:
Commands

Command Information
.arm Will bring up an arm gump to select weapons you wish to save to different arm slots, can then be used like “.arm 1-10” to arm different saved options. You can also select a bag you wish to disarm to and toggle auto disarm before arming.
.autoloop XXXX .autoloop will bring up a gump to select how many loops you want to do in any crafting or gathering type skill, can also be used like “.autoloop xxxx” where xxxx is a number between 0-9999.
.c “.c” brings up chat options for guild chat. “.c xxx” writes a message in guild chat with your current .c options.
.ca “.ca xxx” writes a chat message to your allied guild chat.
.co “.co xxx” writes a chat message to your own guild chat.
.cast .cast works for earth, necro, holy and song books. .cast is used as following “.cast set 1-50” to set a spell you want to save on that slot. “.cast 1-50” to cast the spell you saved on that slot and “.cast reset” to reset the saved spells.
.chat “.chat text” will allow you to chat with the rest of the shard. To turn off chat simply write “.chat off” and to turn it back on “.chat on”.
.clearmsglog This command will clear your .msg log that appears when you type “.msg”.
.commands Will bring up a list of all the commands you can use.
.consider Shows how many innocent kills you have on your record.
.count Counts the number of items in a targeted container.
.disarm This disarms the currently equipped weapons in your hands, if you want it to disarm the weapons to a certain bag type “.disarm bag” and target the bag you want to use instead.
.dropskills Brings up a gump that lets you drop skills to 0, use with caution since there is no going back if mistakes are made. need to be undressed and unmounted to use this command
.email Another way of messaging people, can even message offline people.
.fame Displays your current fame and karma.
.gateprompt Will toggle if you want gates to prompt yes/no before entering. Off by default.
.guards Will call guards in guarded cities to help protect you against evil foes.
.guilds Brings up the guild menu.
.hairshop Brings up the hairshop menu, can only be used in the hairshop. You can find a gate to the hairshop outside of Ocllo bank.
.hungry Shows your current hunger level.
.infovault Brings up the infovault website.
.msg Brings up a msg gump where you can private msg players that are online.
.move Moves all carried items of the same kind as the selected item to the selected bag.
.online Brings up a list of all currently online players showing their names and age. Age is only updated on logoff
.pagans Shows a gump with all the pagan reagents in your backpack.
.password Allows you to change your password for you ultima online account. not for the website
.ph Shows what power hour is active.
.prots Show you all your current protection levels equipped.
.reags Shows a gump with all the reagents in your backpack.
.recalltotem Tells your totem to recall to you, can only be used once a day.
.redeed Redeeds the target back to its original deed, can only be used on items in houses that you own or co-own.
.removejewels Will undress you currently equipped jewelery.
.reply .reply replies to your latest .msg from another player.
.servertime Shows the current time of the server.
.setemail Allow you to an email that are linked to your account, this cannot be changed and are used for password recovery.
.showcaps Shows your skills and stats caps.
.showclasse Will show your current class and level.
.skills Brings up a menu that allows you to control the skill arrows (lock, lower, higher) and see % class.
.suicide This command kills yourself, can be useful if you are stuck somewhere you can’t use the unstuck function in help menu with.
.trashlb Brings up the trash leaderboard.
.togglebuildmark Will toggle the “Yes/No” popup on/off when crafting items.
.togglediff Will toggle the difficulty messages on/off when using skills.
.where Will show your current location. Useful when paging about a location problem so staff can find the location you are talking about.
.whereboat Will give you the location of your boat. UO Automap can be used to find the boat.
.wheretotem Will give you the location of your totem. UO Automap can be used to find the totem.

item.title: General Info
item.description:
Leveling in Zuluhotel Omega

To reach a level in a class you will need to have at least the amounts shown in the table below.

Decimals will not count towards your level so if you have 74.9 in a skill it will count as 74.

To reach higher than level 4 you will need either skill items or get tomes to raise your skill caps.

You can also find stat potions to raise your stat caps.

item.title: Bard
item.description:
Skills

  • Begging
  • Cartography
  • Discordance
  • Herding
  • Musicianship
  • Peacemaking
  • Provocation
  • Taste Identification

Bonuses

  • Bonuses in all their specialized skills.
  • Can use Book of Songs.
  • Can use Archaic book of Verses
  • Gains dexterity and intelligence quicker.
  • Can use shepherd’s crook without mace-fighting, damage and hit chance will check for class level instead.

Penalties

  • Can’t wear plate armor.
  • Can’t wear shields.
  • Can only cast circle 1 spells.
  • Gains strength slower.

Additional info

To fill up the Book of Songs you will need to buy Pen and Ink (Mapmaker NPC) and simply double-click it. Then target the song scroll and the Book of Songs you wish to scribe the song into. To fill up the Archaic book of Verses you need to use the verse scroll by double-clicking it. Upon success it will automatically be added to the Verse book.

item.title: Crafter
item.description:
Skills

  • Arms lore
  • Blacksmithy
  • Bowcraft/Fletching
  • Carpentry
  • Lumberjacking
  • Mining
  • Tailoring
  • Tinkering

Bonuses

  • Bonuses in all their specialized skills.
  • Gains strength quicker.

Penalties

  • Can only cast circle 1 spells.
  • Can’t wear strength mods.
  • Gains intelligence slower.

item.title: GM Items
item.description:

item.title: Item Modifiers
item.description:
Stat prefixes

When an item receives a negative modifier it means the item is cursed.

Cursed items cannot be unequipped. Visit a High Priest to uncurse the item. Simply say “Uncurse” to be able to unequip it or “Purify” to revert the item to it’s positive form.

For example a purified Frail (-8 str) will turn into a Hero’s (+8 str) modifier.

item.title: Mage
item.description:
Skills

  • Alchemy
  • Evaluating intelligence
  • Inscription
  • Item identification
  • Magery
  • Meditation
  • Resisting spells
  • Spirit speak

Bonuses

  • Bonuses in all their specialized skills.
  • Deals increased damage with spells.
  • Penetrates 3% magic protection per class level.
  • Can wear leather armor without receiving magic penalty.
  • Gains intelligence quicker.
  • Can use Black, Quarter and Gnarled staffs without skill for it, damage and hit chance will check for class level instead.

Penalties

  • Can’t wear studded/bone/ringmail/chainmail/platemail armor, shields and items with strength modifiers.
  • Deals less melee damage.
  • Takes increased melee damage.
  • Gains strength slower.

  • All

Bonuses

  • 10% increased skill gain at level 3.
  • 20% increased skill gain at level 4.
  • 30% increased skill gain at level 5.

Penalties

  • No specialized class bonus.

item.title: Ranger
item.description:
Skills

  • Animal lore
  • Animal taming
  • Archery
  • Camping
  • Cooking
  • Fishing
  • Tracking
  • Veterinary

Bonuses

  • Bonuses in all their specialized skills.
  • Deals increased damage with ranged weapons.
  • Can have forensic evaluation skill free of charge, won’t count toward spec skills or off-spec skills.

Penalties

  • Can’t wear plate armor or shields.
  • Can only cast up to circle 5 spells.

item.title: Repair & Refinement
item.description:
How does repair & refinement work?

You will need to make sure you’ve got these things:

1 : a retort tool (can be bought from the vanity shop)

2 : required reagents (see the table below)

Repairing:

To repair an item without the help from a Crafter, you will need to apply mending oil.

Mending Oil will take on the quality of the material used and use it to repair any piece of equipment.

item.title: Rules
item.description:
Macroing

  • You are allowed to macro 24/7.
  • Please do not use a “spam” macro in public places, you won’t be kicked for being idle on this shard. Talking every few seconds is fine though.
  • It is prohibited to spar/macro with above eight different NPC’s and/or players.
  • Do not macro in jail.

Communication

  • While you may use whatever selection of words when communicating with others, be mindful that staff members have full powers to jail you for whatever period of time they deem reasonable if you use any sort of rude language to them. You will first be warned, if you still continue, you may receive up to 5 days jail time if you ignore the warning;
  • Do not spam in any in-game chat system. You may temporarily or permanently lose the ability to communicate via in-game systems if you abuse it;
  • Racism will receive an instant 7 day jail time for the character you used and any other you are associated with;
  • Abuse of staff can result in up to 7 days jail time, decided by the staff member;
  • Speak English in the Global chat (.chat).

Bugs/Hacks/Cheats/Exploits/Loopholes

  • Using, abusing, or failing to report an error in the game which may give unintentional benefits will not go unnoticed for long, and may in return see you permanently lose stats, skills, characters or accounts depending on the severity of the bug abuse.
  • If you find any exploitable bug, please report it immediately with either the in-game help system or PM Nagash the details of the bug. Not doing so will be severely punished.
  • There are in-game tools that we can use to track inconsistencies, so you will not get away with any major exploit for long if you choose to abuse bugs.
  • Any minor glitches/bugs may be reported in the Bugs and Suggestions thread in the forum or also by using the in-game help menu.

Ghosting

What does “Ghosting” mean? It basically means that placing a stationary character in front or inside a dungeon or other points of interest(only NPC related points of interest) to observe when someone is entering a place such as a dungeon is illegal.

item.title: Server Info
item.description:
Server

  • The emulator is POL1.00.
  • The server is situated in the Netherlands hosted on a 500/500 Mbit internet connection.

Skills, stats and classes

Classes feature the same mechanics as the original Zuluhotel 3. Which means 130 skill/stat soft-cap and 150 skill hard-cap with no stat cap.

Skillgain speed will be moderate. Which essentially means that certain skills are easier to train than others. You will be able to start out with a boost of two skills (of your choice) set to 90 and one stat (Str, Dex, Int) to 90.

item.title: Skill Modifiers
item.description:
Skill prefixes

Skill prefixes on weapons are multiplied by 5, so as an example an Expert Fencer’s Kryss will give 3 * 5 = 15 fencing.

Weapon skill mods can’t become legendary level.

You can’t gain over the cap of the skill item, so as an example if you have 100 fencing and equip an Expert Fencer’s Kryss you will only get 110 fencing since that’s the cap for expert items.

item.title: Thief
item.description:
Skills

  • Detecting hidden
  • Hiding
  • Lockpicking
  • Poisoning
  • Remove trap
  • Snooping
  • Stealing
  • Stealth

Bonuses

  • Bonuses in all their specialized skills.
  • Deals increased damage with poison.
  • Can poison anything, protections doesn’t work against thief poisons.
  • Gains dexterity quicker.
  • Can use crossbow, heavy crossbow, bow, kryss, short spear, spear, war fork, knife, skinning knife and pitchfork without skill for it, damage and hit chance will check for class level instead.

Penalties

  • Can’t wear ringmail/chainmail/platemail armor or shields.
  • Can only cast up to circle 5 spells.

item.title: Warrior
item.description:
Skills

  • Anatomy
  • Fencing
  • Healing
  • Mace Fighting
  • Parrying
  • Swordsmanship
  • Tactics
  • Wrestling

Bonuses

  • Bonuses in all their specialized skills.
  • Deals increased damage with melee weapons.
  • Receives less melee damage.
  • Gains strength quicker.

Penalties

  • Can’t equip intelligence mods.
  • Takes increased spell damage.
  • Deals less spell damage.
  • Cast spells slower.
  • Won’t get any bonuses from equipping magic reflect items.
  • Can only cast circle 1 spells.
  • Gains intelligence slower.

item.title: Weapon Modifiers
item.description:
Stat prefixes

When an item receives a negative modifier it means the item is cursed.

Cursed items cannot be unequipped. Visit a High Priest to uncurse the item. Simply say “Uncurse” to be able to unequip it or “Purify” to revert the item to it’s positive form.

For example a purified Frail (-8 str) will turn into a Hero’s (+8 str) modifier.

item.title: Play Now
item.description:
Below are the instructions on how to get started. Please read carefully…

If you have any issues contact us on Discord.

Please download and install Ultima Online 9th Anniversary first. Make sure NOT to update it.

Requirements

  • A fresh installed Ultima Online 9th anniversary edition that hasn’t been updated.
  • A program that can open .zip files (Winzip, Winrar, 7-Zip etc…)

Step 1

Download our shard files.
